auth.login.subtitle: Your connection to your local mosque
auth.otp.title: Enter verification code
auth.otp.subtitle: We sent a code to {{destination}}
auth.onboarding.title: Welcome to Masjidy
auth.onboarding.subtitle: Set up your device for local prayer times and nearby mosque discovery
auth.onboarding.locationPending: Allow location access so Masjidy can show nearby mosques and accurate prayer times.
auth.onboarding.locationGranted: Location access is enabled. You can update this anytime from your device settings.
auth.onboarding.locationDenied: Location access is currently off. You can continue and enable it later.
auth.onboarding.displayNameHelper: Used locally for now. If you sign in later, we can sync it to your account.
auth.error.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
auth.error.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
auth.error.otpFailed: That code did not work. Please try again.
auth.error.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
auth.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.error.nameTooShort: Display name must be at least 2 characters
auth.error.nameTooLong: Display name must be 50 characters or fewer
auth.error.googleNotConfigured: Google sign-in is not configured for this build yet
auth.error.providerUnavailable: This sign-in method is not available right now
auth.error.googlePlayServices: Google Play Services is required on this device
profile.authenticatedSubtitle: Your account is connected. Auth-only features will sync with the cloud.
profile.anonymousSubtitle: You can keep using the app without an account and sign in later if you want sync and community actions.
profile.signInCardSubtitle: Sign in when you want to submit times, check in, enable notifications, and sync your preferences across devices.
